info.title: Specification
info.description: Specifications are the core data objects provided by Specification Management. With these APIs, you can read, create and maintain specification versions, as well as perform actions related to them. You can also read, and maintain the property values of specification versions, their country and plant validities, as well as product assignments.

x-sap-shortText: Read and maintain specifications in Specification Management.

tags.name: Allowed Product Categories for Specification Type

post.description:
Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Requests](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_BatchRequests).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

multipart/mixed;boundary=request-separat.example:
--request-separator
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

GET SpecificationVersions HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json


--request-separator--

multipart/mixed.example:
--response-separator
Content-Type: application/http

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{...}
--response-separator--

post.summary: Creates a single boolean attribute value
post.description: Boolean value is one attribute field type. For providing the value of a boolean field of an attribute property of a specification version, a matching property instance assignment is required. Furthermore, an attribute property row has to be prepared, containing the corresponding boolean field. With this data in place, you can use this API to create a new boolean attribute value.
